calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Owen Mayer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Travel Related Services, Inc.
No appearance by defendant Trevor Rodrigues, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on March 27, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 10, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 4, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Travel Related Services, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Trevor Rodrigues, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $84,221.03.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,353.22.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $426.00, for a total judgement in the amount of $92,826.20.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
